title: Create /onboarding/landlord page (display name confirmation)
description: Create the single-step landlord onboarding page where landlords confirm their display or trading name.
acceptance_criteria: Page heading: 'Set up your landlord profile'
A text input pre-filled with the user's display_name from profiles
Label: 'Your name or agency name (shown on listings)'
Input is required and non-empty before button enables

steps.details:
<label>Your name or agency name<input type='text' id='display-name' required></label>
<button id='go-to-listings' disabled>Go to my listings</button>

technical_notes: 'Go to my listings' click handler and Supabase write are in TASK-034.
